channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: c24cf47c-5077-412d-a19c-45202126392c
Display name: Dev Compute SandboxGroup Data Owner
Description: Ownership of all SandboxGroup data.
Link: https://management.azure.com/c24cf47c-5077-412d-a19c-45202126392c?api-version=2022-04-01
